name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch
entries: This belt pouch appears empty and has 10 charges. While holding the pouch, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 charge, name any nonmagical food seasoning (such as salt, pepper, saffron, or cilantro), and remove a pinch of the desired seasoning from the pouch. A pinch is enough to season a single meal. The pouch regains {@dice 1d6 + 4} expended charges daily at dawn.
